title: No Pumpkin Blur
description: Simply removes Pumpkin blut in first-person view. better for End Fight.
body:
# No Pumpkin Blur
Simple Resource pack that remove blur when put on Pumpkin.

---

![Remove like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d9f28317e724313525fce6717f64cd357ad8953.jpeg)

---

## Why To Dwonload!
- Better for End Fight's
- Better for some PvP fights. Too

---

### ⚠️ Compatibility Note
- Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only
- Not Tested with Mods
